label: Number Theory
shortDescription: The queen of mathematics. From elementary divisibility and primes to analytic and algebraic number theory.
modulesDescription: Read the number theory chapters in order, or jump directly to the topic you need.
ogTitle: Learn Number Theory for Free | CalcPath
ogDescription: Master number theory from divisors and primes through quadratic residues, Diophantine equations, the prime number theorem, and algebraic number theory — with rich explanations and hundreds of practice problems.
courseDescription: A free in-depth course on number theory: elementary topics (divisibility, primes, Euclidean algorithm, modular arithmetic, Fermat and Wilson theorems), arithmetic functions and convolutions, quadratic reciprocity and Gauss sums, classical Diophantine equations including Pell and Pythagorean triples, analytic number theory (zeta, PNT, Dirichlet theorems), and algebraic number theory (algebraic integers, rings of integers, Dedekind domains, class groups, units). Every topic includes ELI5 intuitions, detailed worked examples, common mistakes, and targeted practice questions.

topics.title: Divisors
topics.description: Divisors, proper divisors, and basic divisibility properties of integers.

topics.title: Prime Numbers
topics.description: Definition of primes, infinitude, factorization, and primality testing basics.

topics.title: Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic
topics.description: Unique prime factorization and its consequences for divisibility and gcd.

topics.title: Euclidean Algorithm
topics.description: Efficient computation of GCD and the extended Euclidean algorithm for Bezout coefficients.

topics.title: Modular Arithmetic
topics.description: Congruences, residue classes, modular inverses, and solving linear congruences.

topics.title: Chinese Remainder Theorem
topics.description: Solving systems of simultaneous congruences with coprime moduli.

topics.title: Fermat's Little Theorem
topics.description: Fermat's Little Theorem, its proof, and applications to primality and modular exponentiation.

topics.title: Wilson's Theorem
topics.description: Wilson's Theorem characterizing primes via factorials modulo p.

topics.title: Congruence Relations
topics.description: Properties of congruence as equivalence relation and ring structure on Z/nZ.

topics.title: Euler's Totient Function
topics.description: Definition, formula, and properties of φ(n) counting integers coprime to n.

topics.title: Möbius Function
topics.description: The Möbius μ function, its definition via square-free integers, and inversion formula.

topics.title: Dirichlet Convolution
topics.description: The Dirichlet convolution of arithmetic functions and its algebraic properties.

topics.title: Arithmetic Functions
topics.description: General arithmetic functions, completely multiplicative, and additive functions.

topics.title: Carmichael Function
topics.description: The Carmichael λ(n) function as the exponent of the multiplicative group modulo n.

topics.title: Sum of Divisors Function
topics.description: The divisor function σ(n) and its multiplicative properties.

topics.title: Multiplicative Functions
topics.description: Multiplicative and completely multiplicative arithmetic functions and their preservation under convolution.

topics.title: Quadratic Residues
topics.description: Quadratic residues and non-residues modulo a prime, and Euler's criterion.

topics.title: Legendre Symbol
topics.description: The Legendre symbol and its properties for determining quadratic residuosity.

topics.title: Jacobi Symbol
topics.description: The Jacobi symbol as generalization of Legendre symbol to composite moduli.

topics.title: Quadratic Reciprocity
topics.description: The law of quadratic reciprocity and its use in evaluating Legendre symbols.

topics.title: Quadratic Gauss Sums
topics.description: Gauss sums and their role in proving quadratic reciprocity and evaluating character sums.

topics.title: Hasse Principle
topics.description: Local-global principles for quadratic forms and the Hasse-Minkowski theorem.

topics.title: Diophantine Equations
topics.description: Integer solutions to polynomial equations, with focus on linear and quadratic cases.

topics.title: Linear Diophantine Equations
topics.description: Solving ax + by = c in integers using the extended Euclidean algorithm.

topics.title: Pythagorean Triples
topics.description: Primitive and non-primitive Pythagorean triples and their parametrization.

topics.title: Fermat's Last Theorem
topics.description: Fermat's Last Theorem for n>2, its history, and overview of Wiles' proof.

topics.title: Pell's Equation
topics.description: Solving the Pell equation x² - d y² = 1 and its infinite solutions via continued fractions.

topics.title: Thue's Theorem
topics.description: Thue's theorem on approximation of algebraic numbers and its applications to Diophantine equations.

topics.title: Riemann Zeta Function
topics.description: The Riemann zeta function, its Euler product, and connection to the distribution of primes.

topics.title: Prime Number Theorem
topics.description: The prime number theorem relating π(x) to li(x) or x / log x, and its significance.

topics.title: Dirichlet's Theorem on Arithmetic Progressions
topics.description: Infinitely many primes in arithmetic progressions with coprime modulus and residue.

topics.title: Dirichlet L-functions
topics.description: Dirichlet L-functions as generalizations of the zeta function for characters.

topics.title: Mertens' Theorems
topics.description: Mertens' theorems on products over primes and asymptotic estimates involving φ and μ.

topics.title: Algebraic Number Theory
topics.description: Introduction to algebraic number fields, rings of integers, and unique factorization failure.

topics.title: Algebraic Integers
topics.description: Algebraic integers as roots of monic polynomials with integer coefficients.

topics.title: Ring of Integers
topics.description: The ring of integers of a number field and its properties as a Dedekind domain.

topics.title: Dedekind Domains
topics.description: Dedekind domains, unique factorization of ideals, and ideal class groups.

topics.title: Ideal Class Group
topics.description: The ideal class group measuring failure of unique factorization into principal ideals.

topics.title: Dirichlet's Unit Theorem
topics.description: The structure of the unit group of the ring of integers in a number field.
